description_long: This object is a round wooden picnic table with four curved bench seats evenly spaced around its perimeter. The tabletop and benches are constructed from weathered wooden planks, giving it a rustic and natural appearance suitable for outdoor environments. The benches are supported by sturdy wooden legs that are directly connected to the table's central support structure, ensuring stability. The wood shows signs of aging, with a slightly grayish-green patina, likely from prolonged exposure to the elements. The table is elevated off the ground, with enough clearance for comfortable seating and legroom. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A round, weathered wooden picnic table with four attached curved benches and a rustic outdoor appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop and two of the curved benches clearly, with the support structure visible beneath.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature of the benches and the connection between the benches and the table.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite side of the table and benches with similar structural details.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, again emphasizing the bench curvature and table support.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by a central wooden post with four sturdy legs radiating outward, each connected to the benches for added stability.
